Value.uax:XmlElement:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<script>
  <metadata>
    <priority>0</priority>
  </metadata>
  <code><![CDATA[/**
 * Code for the redundancy status object display
 * ----------------------------------------
 * This script supports the display to show the current state of the redundancy.
 * Data will be provided for the "Primary" (=left part of the display) and
 * "Secondary" (=right part of the display) server, as further for the database states.
 */

/**
 * EXTENSIONS SECTION
 */
webMI.callExtension("SYSTEM.LIBRARY.ATVISE.QUICKDYNAMICS.Tooltip", { id: "id_split_on", text: "Split Mode Active" });
webMI.callExtension("SYSTEM.LIBRARY.ATVISE.QUICKDYNAMICS.Tooltip", { id: "id_split_off", text: "Redundancy Active" });
const accessControlManager = webMI.getAccessControlSupport()
	? webMI.callExtension("SYSTEM.LIBRARY.ATVISE.QUICKDYNAMICS.Access Control Manager")
	: false;
webMI.query.displayAcNotification = "true";

/**
 * DECLARATION SECTION
 */
var data = {};
data.result = [];
var displayMessageDialog = webMI.query["displayMessageDialog"];
var displayVitalityTable = webMI.query["displayVitalityTable"];
var globalOverlayInfo;
var lockSwitchPreferred = true;
var timedelta_limit1 = 1000; //Limit for status yellow of time delta in ms
var timedelta_limit2 = 5000; //Limit for status red of time delta in ms

/**
 * UI SETUP SECTION
 * with AC
 */
webMI.addOnload(function () {
	webMI.trigger.fire("com.atvise.setActive", false, "switch_preferred");
	webMI.trigger.fire("com.atvise.setActive", false, "current_preffered");

	if (accessControlManager) {
		var compareRights = [{ node: "AGENT.REDUNDANCY", right: "read" }];

		/* setup display depending on rights */
		accessControlManager.assist.handleWithPermissions(
			compareRights,
			function success() {
				setUpDisplay();
			},
			function failure() {
				return;
			}
		);
	} else {
		setUpDisplay();
	}
});

/**
 * RUNTIME SECTION
 */
function setUpDisplay() {
	webMI.gfx.setVisible("primary_overlay", false);
	webMI.gfx.setVisible("secondary_overlay", false);
	webMI.gfx.setVisible("center_overlay", false);

	webMI.addOnload(function () {
		webMI.data.subscribe("AGENT.REDUNDANCY.system_splitmode", function (e) {
			if (e != null && e.value != null) {
				webMI.trigger.fire("setValue", e.value ? "T{Split mode}" : "T{Redundancy mode}", "operating-mode");
				webMI.gfx.setVisible("split_indicator", !e.value);
			} else {
				webMI.trigger.fire("setValue", "-", "operating-mode");
			}
		});

		webMI.data.subscribe("AGENT.REDUNDANCY.system_preferred", function (e) {
			if (e != null && e.value != null) {
				webMI.trigger.fire("setValue", e.value, "current_preffered");
			} else {
				webMI.trigger.fire("setValue", "-", "current_preffered");
			}
		});
	});

	webMI.data.subscribe("AGENT.REDUNDANCY.PRIMARY.status", function (e) {
		if (e.value && e.value.charAt(0) === "S") e.value = e.value.toUpperCase();

		webMI.gfx.setText("primary_status", getServerStatusTranslation(e.value));
		webMI.gfx.setFill("primary_led", e.value === "Active" ? "#04ff00" : "#bababa");
		webMI.gfx.setFill("primary_led_shadow", e.value === "Active" ? "url(#linear_4)" : "url(#linear_24)");
	});

	webMI.data.subscribe("AGENT.REDUNDANCY.SECONDARY.status", function (e) {
		if (e.value && e.value.charAt(0) === "S") e.value = e.value.toUpperCase();

		webMI.gfx.setText("secondary_status", getServerStatusTranslation(e.value));
		webMI.gfx.setFill("secondary_led", e.value === "Active" ? "#04ff00" : "#bababa");
		webMI.gfx.setFill("secondary_led_shadow", e.value === "Active" ? "url(#linear_4)" : "url(#linear_24)");
	});

	webMI.data.subscribe("AGENT.REDUNDANCY.PRIMARY.vitality_status", function (e) {
		webMI.gfx.setText("primary_vitality_status", e.value);
	});

	webMI.data.subscribe("AGENT.REDUNDANCY.SECONDARY.vitality_status", function (e) {
		webMI.gfx.setText("secondary_vitality_status", e.value);
	});

	webMI.data.subscribe("AGENT.REDUNDANCY.PRIMARY.INFORMATION.DIAGNOSTICS.MEM.TotalMemUsedPercent", function (e) {
		typeof e.value != "undefined"
			? webMI.gfx.setText("primary_memory", webMI.sprintf("%0.1f", e.value) + " %")
			: webMI.gfx.setText("primary_memory", "-");
	});

	webMI.data.subscribe("AGENT.REDUNDANCY.PRIMARY.INFORMATION.DIAGNOSTICS.CPU.TotalCPUPercent", function (e) {
		typeof e.value != "undefined"
			? webMI.gfx.setText("primary_cpu", webMI.sprintf("%0.0f", e.value) + " %")
			: webMI.gfx.setText("primary_cpu", "-");
	});

	webMI.data.subscribe("AGENT.REDUNDANCY.SECONDARY.INFORMATION.DIAGNOSTICS.MEM.TotalMemUsedPercent", function (e) {
		typeof e.value != "undefined"
			? webMI.gfx.setText("secondary_memory", webMI.sprintf("%0.1f", e.value) + " %")
			: webMI.gfx.setText("secondary_memory", "-");
	});

	webMI.data.subscribe("AGENT.REDUNDANCY.SECONDARY.INFORMATION.DIAGNOSTICS.CPU.TotalCPUPercent", function (e) {
		typeof e.value != "undefined"
			? webMI.gfx.setText("secondary_cpu", webMI.sprintf("%0.0f", e.value) + " %")
			: webMI.gfx.setText("secondary_cpu", "-");
	});

	webMI.data.subscribe("AGENT.REDUNDANCY.PRIMARY.time_delta", function (e) {
		var timediff = e.value;
		if (Math.abs(timediff) < 10000) timediff = e.value + " ms";
		else timediff = webMI.sprintf("%0.1f", e.value / 1000) + " s";

		webMI.gfx.setText("primary_timediff", timediff);
		if (Math.abs(e.value) <= timedelta_limit1) webMI.gfx.setFill("primary_td_indicator_bg", "#04ff00");
		else if (Math.abs(e.value) <= timedelta_limit2) webMI.gfx.setFill("primary_td_indicator_bg", "#ffcc00");
		else if (Math.abs(e.value) > timedelta_limit2) webMI.gfx.setFill("primary_td_indicator_bg", "#ff471a");
	});

	webMI.data.subscribe("AGENT.REDUNDANCY.SECONDARY.time_delta", function (e) {
		var timediff = e.value;
		if (Math.abs(timediff) < 10000) timediff = e.value + " ms";
		else timediff = webMI.sprintf("%0.1f", e.value / 1000) + " s";

		webMI.gfx.setText("secondary_timediff", timediff);
		if (Math.abs(e.value) <= timedelta_limit1) webMI.gfx.setFill("secondary_td_indicator_bg", "#04ff00");
		else if (Math.abs(e.value) <= timedelta_limit2) webMI.gfx.setFill("secondary_td_indicator_bg", "#ffcc00");
		else if (Math.abs(e.value) > timedelta_limit2) webMI.gfx.setFill("secondary_td_indicator_bg", "#ff471a");
	});

	webMI.data.subscribe("AGENT.REDUNDANCY.switching_status", function (e) {
		webMI.gfx.setText("switchover_status", "T{STATUS}: " + getSwitchOverStatusTranslation(e.value));

		if (
			e.value == "Initialize" ||
			e.value == "Listen" ||
			e.value == "Prepare" ||
			e.value == "Prepared" ||
			e.value == "Switch"
		) {
			webMI.trigger.fire("com.atvise.setActive", false, "switch_preferred");
			webMI.trigger.fire("com.atvise.setActive", false, "current_preffered");
		} else {
			setPreferredButtonActive();
		}

		if (accessControlManager) {
			accessControlManager.getRights(["AGENT.REDUNDANCY.system_preferred"], ["execute"], (response) => {
				let writeRight = response.result[0].value;

				if (!writeRight) {
					webMI.trigger.fire("com.atvise.setActive", false, "switch_preferred");
					webMI.trigger.fire("com.atvise.setActive", false, "current_preffered");
				}
			});

			accessControlManager.getRights(
				["AGENT.REDUNDANCY.system_splitmode", "AGENT.REDUNDANCY.system_splitmode"],
				["execute", "read"],
				(response) => {
					let writeRight = response.result[0].value;
					let readRight = response.result[1].value;

					if (!writeRight) {
						webMI.trigger.fire("com.atvise.setActive", false, "id_split_off");
						webMI.trigger.fire("com.atvise.setActive", false, "id_split_on");
						webMI.trigger.fire("com.atvise.setActive", false, "operating-mode");
					} else {
						webMI.trigger.fire("com.atvise.setActive", true, "operating-mode");
					}

					if (!readRight) {
						webMI.trigger.fire("com.atvise.setActive", false, "operating-mode");
					}
				}
			);
		}
	});

	webMI.data.subscribe("AGENT.REDUNDANCY.system_switching_diag", function (e) {
		if (e.value != "") {
			webMI.gfx.setText("switchover_status", "T{STATUS}: " + getSwitchOverStatusTranslation(e.value));
		} else {
			webMI.data.read("AGENT.REDUNDANCY.switching_status", function (e) {
				webMI.gfx.setText("switchover_status", "T{STATUS}: " + getSwitchOverStatusTranslation(e.value));
			});
		}
	});

	webMI.data.subscribe("AGENT.REDUNDANCY.system_splitmode_diag", function (e) {
		webMI.gfx.setText("operating_status", "T{STATUS}: " + getOperatingStatusTranslation(e.value));
	});

	webMI.data.subscribeBlock(
		[
			"AGENT.REDUNDANCY.replication_status",
			"AGENT.REDUNDANCY.system_splitmode",
			"AGENT.REDUNDANCY.connection_status_network1",
			"AGENT.REDUNDANCY.connection_status_network2",
			"AGENT.REDUNDANCY.role"
		],
		function (e) {
			if (!e[1].value) {
				webMI.gfx.setText("replication_status", "T{STATUS}: " + getReplicationStatusTranslation(e[0].value));
			} else {
				webMI.gfx.setText("replication_status", "T{STATUS}: -");
			}

			webMI.gfx.setVisible("id_split_on", e[1].value ? null : false);
			webMI.gfx.setVisible("id_split_off", !e[1].value ? null : false);

			if (e[0].value && e[0].value.search("Replicating") == 0) {
				webMI.gfx.setRotation(
					"replication_indicator",
					e[0].value == "Replicating P->S" || e[0].value == "Replicating History P->S" ? 0 : 180
				);
				webMI.gfx.setVisible("replication_indicator", {
					0: true,
					2: false,
					4: true,
					6: false,
					8: true,
					10: false
				});
				webMI.trigger.fire("com.atvise.setActive", false, "id_split_off");
				webMI.trigger.fire("com.atvise.setActive", false, "id_split_on");
				webMI.trigger.fire("com.atvise.setActive", false, "operating-mode");
			} else {
				webMI.gfx.setVisible("replication_indicator", false);
				setSplitButtonActive();
			}

			var connection_status_nw1 = e[2].value;
			var connection_status_nw2 = e[3].value;
			var role = e[4].value;
			var replicationFinished = false;
			if (!e[1].value) {
				replicationFinished = e[0].value != "Replicating S->P" && e[0].value != "Replicating P->S";
			} else {
				// splitmode
				replicationFinished = true;
			}

			var syncConnectionAvailable = connection_status_nw1 == "Connected";

			if (!syncConnectionAvailable) {
				syncConnectionAvailable = connection_status_nw2 == "Connected";
			}

			var overlay = "secondary_overlay";
			if (role == "Secondary") {
				overlay = "primary_overlay";
			}

			if (!syncConnectionAvailable || !replicationFinished) {
				webMI.gfx.setVisible(overlay, null);
				globalOverlayInfo = { overlay: overlay, value: true };
				webMI.trigger.fire("com.atvise.redundancey_update", globalOverlayInfo, "connection_table");
			} else {
				webMI.gfx.setVisible(overlay, false);
				globalOverlayInfo = { overlay: overlay, value: false };
				webMI.trigger.fire("com.atvise.redundancey_update", globalOverlayInfo, "connection_table");
			}
		}
	);

	webMI.data.subscribeBlock(
		["AGENT.REDUNDANCY.PRIMARY.connection_status_network1", "AGENT.REDUNDANCY.PRIMARY.primary_network1"],
		function (e) {
			if (e[1].value != "") webMI.gfx.setFill("primary_connector1", e[0].value == "Connected" ? "#47db0c" : "#db0c0c");

			webMI.gfx.setText("primary_server_address1", e[1].value);
			webMI.gfx.setVisible("server_network1", e[1].value == "" ? false : true);
		}
	);

	webMI.data.subscribeBlock(
		["AGENT.REDUNDANCY.PRIMARY.connection_status_network2", "AGENT.REDUNDANCY.PRIMARY.primary_network2"],
		function (e) {
			if (e[1].value != "") webMI.gfx.setFill("primary_connector2", e[0].value == "Connected" ? "#47db0c" : "#db0c0c");

			webMI.gfx.setText("primary_server_address2", e[1].value);
			webMI.gfx.setVisible("server_network2", e[1].value == "" ? false : true);
		}
	);

	webMI.data.subscribeBlock(
		["AGENT.REDUNDANCY.SECONDARY.connection_status_network1", "AGENT.REDUNDANCY.SECONDARY.secondary_network1"],
		function (e) {
			if (e[1].value != "")
				webMI.gfx.setFill("secondary_connector1", e[0].value == "Connected" ? "#47db0c" : "#db0c0c");

			webMI.gfx.setText("secondary_server_address1", e[1].value);
			webMI.gfx.setVisible("server_network1", e[1].value == "" ? false : true);
		}
	);

	webMI.data.subscribeBlock(
		["AGENT.REDUNDANCY.SECONDARY.connection_status_network2", "AGENT.REDUNDANCY.SECONDARY.secondary_network2"],
		function (e) {
			if (e[1].value != "")
				webMI.gfx.setFill("secondary_connector2", e[0].value == "Connected" ? "#47db0c" : "#db0c0c");

			webMI.gfx.setText("secondary_server_address2", e[1].value);
			webMI.gfx.setVisible("server_network2", e[1].value == "" ? false : true);
		}
	);

	webMI.data.subscribeBlock(
		[
			"AGENT.REDUNDANCY.PRIMARY.connection_status_network1",
			"AGENT.REDUNDANCY.PRIMARY.connection_status_network2",
			"AGENT.REDUNDANCY.SECONDARY.connection_status_network1",
			"AGENT.REDUNDANCY.SECONDARY.connection_status_network2",
			"AGENT.REDUNDANCY.PRIMARY.primary_network1",
			"AGENT.REDUNDANCY.PRIMARY.primary_network2",
			"AGENT.REDUNDANCY.SECONDARY.secondary_network1",
			"AGENT.REDUNDANCY.SECONDARY.secondary_network2"
		],
		function (e) {
			if (e[4].value != "" && e[6].value != "")
				webMI.gfx.setStroke(
					"server_network1",
					e[0].value == "Connected" && e[2].value == "Connected" ? "#04ff00" : "#6d6d6d"
				);
			if (e[5].value != "" && e[7].value != "")
				webMI.gfx.setStroke(
					"server_network2",
					e[1].value == "Connected" && e[3].value == "Connected" ? "#04ff00" : "#6d6d6d"
				);
		}
	);

	webMI.data.subscribeBlock(
		["AGENT.REDUNDANCY.PRIMARY.primary_visu_network1", "AGENT.REDUNDANCY.PRIMARY.primary_visu_network2"],
		function (e) {
			if (e[0] && e[0].value) {
				const ids = e[0].value.split("@");
				webMI.gfx.setText("primary_web_address1", ids[0]);
				if (ids.length > 1) {
					webMI.callExtension("SYSTEM.LIBRARY.ATVISE.QUICKDYNAMICS.Tooltip", {
						id: "primary_web_address1",
						text: ids[1]
					});
				}
			}

			if (e[1] && e[1].value) {
				const ids = e[1].value.split("@");
				webMI.gfx.setText("primary_web_address2", ids[0]);
				if (ids.length > 1) {
					webMI.callExtension("SYSTEM.LIBRARY.ATVISE.QUICKDYNAMICS.Tooltip", {
						id: "primary_web_address2",
						text: ids[1]
					});
				}
			}

			webMI.gfx.setVisible("primary_web1", e[0].value == "" ? false : true);
			webMI.gfx.setVisible("primary_web2", e[1].value == "" ? false : true);
		}
	);

	webMI.data.subscribeBlock(
		["AGENT.REDUNDANCY.SECONDARY.secondary_visu_network1", "AGENT.REDUNDANCY.SECONDARY.secondary_visu_network2"],
		function (e) {
			if (e[0] && e[0].value) {
				const ids = e[0].value.split("@");
				webMI.gfx.setText("secondary_web_address1", ids[0]);
				if (ids.length > 1) {
					webMI.callExtension("SYSTEM.LIBRARY.ATVISE.QUICKDYNAMICS.Tooltip", {
						id: "secondary_web_address1",
						text: ids[1]
					});
				}
			}

			if (e[1] && e[1].value) {
				const ids = e[1].value.split("@");
				webMI.gfx.setText("secondary_web_address2", ids[0]);
				if (ids.length > 1) {
					webMI.callExtension("SYSTEM.LIBRARY.ATVISE.QUICKDYNAMICS.Tooltip", {
						id: "secondary_web_address2",
						text: ids[1]
					});
				}
			}

			webMI.gfx.setVisible("secondary_web1", e[0].value == "" ? false : true);
			webMI.gfx.setVisible("secondary_web2", e[1].value == "" ? false : true);
		}
	);

	/**
	 * FUNCTION SECTION
	 */

	/**
	 * get translation of server status
	 * @param text
	 * @returns {*}
	 */
	function getServerStatusTranslation(text) {
		var statustext;
		switch (text) {
			case "Active":
				statustext = "T{Active}";
				break;
			case "Passive":
				statustext = "T{Passive}";
				break;
			case "SOP":
				statustext = "T{SOP}";
				break;
			case "SNOP":
				statustext = "T{SNOP}";
				break;
			default:
				statustext = text;
		}

		return statustext;
	}

	/**
	 * get translation of operating status
	 * @param text
	 * @returns {*}
	 */
	function getOperatingStatusTranslation(text) {
		var statustext;
		switch (text) {
			case "":
				statustext = "T{OK}";
				break;
			case "SwitchingInProgress":
				statustext = "T{Aborted}. T{Switching in progress}";
				break;
			case "ReplicationInProgress":
				statustext = "T{Aborted}. T{Replication in progress}";
				break;
			case "InFailover":
				statustext = "T{Aborted}. T{Vitality insufficient}";
				break;
			default:
				statustext = text;
		}

		return statustext;
	}

	/**
	 * get translation of switch over status
	 * @param text
	 * @returns {*}
	 */
	function getSwitchOverStatusTranslation(text) {
		var statustext;
		switch (text) {
			case "Ready":
				statustext = "T{Ready}";
				break;
			case "Resigned":
				statustext = "T{Resigned}";
				break;
			case "Abort":
				statustext = "T{Abort}";
				break;
			case "Aborting":
				statustext = "T{Aborting}";
				break;
			case "Aborted":
				statustext = "T{Aborted}";
				break;
			case "Initialize":
				statustext = "T{Initialize}";
				break;
			case "Listen":
				statustext = "T{Listen}";
				break;
			case "Prepare":
				statustext = "T{Prepare}";
				break;
			case "Timeout":
				statustext = "T{Timeout}";
				break;
			case "Prepared":
				statustext = "T{Prepared}";
				break;
			case "Switch":
				statustext = "T{Switch}";
				break;
			case "Switched":
				statustext = "T{Switched}";
				break;
			case "Complete":
				statustext = "T{Complete}";
				break;
			case "Completed":
				statustext = "T{Completed}";
				break;
			case "Undefined":
				statustext = "T{Undefined}";
				break;
			case "NotConnected":
				statustext = "T{Servers are not linked}";
				break;
			case "ReplicationInProgress":
				statustext = "T{Replication in progress}";
				break;
			case "InFailover":
				statustext = "T{Vitality insufficient}";
				break;
			case "Waiting":
				statustext = "T{Waiting for timeout}";
				break;
			default:
				statustext = text;
		}

		return statustext;
	}

	/**
	 * get translation of replication status
	 * @param text
	 * @returns {*}
	 */
	function getReplicationStatusTranslation(text) {
		var statustext;
		switch (text) {
			case "Ready":
				statustext = "T{Completed}";
				break;
			case "Resigned":
				statustext = "T{Resigned}";
				break;
			case "Resigned History":
				statustext = "T{Resigned History}";
				break;
			case "Replication Requested":
				statustext = "T{Replication Requested}";
				break;
			case "History Replication Requested":
				statustext = "T{History Replication Requested}";
				break;
			case "Replicating S->P":
				statustext = "T{Replicating S->P}";
				break;
			case "Replicating P->S":
				statustext = "T{Replicating P->S}";
				break;
			case "Replicating History S->P":
				statustext = "T{Replicating History S->P}";
				break;
			case "Replicating History P->S":
				statustext = "T{Replicating History P->S}";
				break;
			case "Replicating ?->?":
				statustext = "T{Replicating ?->?}";
				break;
			case "Undefined":
				statustext = "T{Undefined}";
				break;
			default:
				statustext = text;
		}

		return statustext;
	}

	/**
	 * EVENT SECTION
	 */
	webMI.addEvent(webMI.data, "serverstatechange", function (e) {
		lockSwitchPreferred = !e.passive["connection-status"].primary && !e.passive["connection-status"].secondary;

		var ACTIVECOLOR = "#04ff00";
		var INACTIVECOLOR = "#db0c0c";
		var NULLCOLOR = "#bababa";

		var active = {
			web1: "primary_web1",
			web2: "primary_web2",
			web1_connector: "primary_web1_connector",
			web2_connector: "primary_web2_connector"
		};
		var passive = {
			web1: "secondary_web1",
			web2: "secondary_web2",
			web1_connector: "secondary_web1_connector",
			web2_connector: "secondary_web2_connector"
		};

		if (e.active.role == "Secondary" || e.passive.role == "Primary") {
			active = {
				web1: "secondary_web1",
				web2: "secondary_web2",
				web1_connector: "secondary_web1_connector",
				web2_connector: "secondary_web2_connector"
			};
			passive = {
				web1: "primary_web1",
				web2: "primary_web2",
				web1_connector: "primary_web1_connector",
				web2_connector: "primary_web2_connector"
			};
		}

		var state = {
			actPrm: e.active["connection-status"].primary,
			actSec: e.active["connection-status"].secondary,
			pasPrm: e.passive["connection-status"].primary,
			pasSec: e.passive["connection-status"].secondary
		};

		webMI.gfx.setStroke(active.web1, state.actPrm ? ACTIVECOLOR : state.actPrm === null ? NULLCOLOR : INACTIVECOLOR);
		webMI.gfx.setStroke(active.web2, state.actSec ? ACTIVECOLOR : state.actSec === null ? NULLCOLOR : INACTIVECOLOR);
		webMI.gfx.setStroke(passive.web1, state.pasPrm ? ACTIVECOLOR : state.pasPrm === null ? NULLCOLOR : INACTIVECOLOR);
		webMI.gfx.setStroke(passive.web2, state.pasSec ? ACTIVECOLOR : state.pasSec === null ? NULLCOLOR : INACTIVECOLOR);

		webMI.gfx.setFill(
			active.web1_connector,
			state.actPrm ? ACTIVECOLOR : state.actPrm === null ? NULLCOLOR : INACTIVECOLOR
		);
		webMI.gfx.setFill(
			active.web2_connector,
			state.actSec ? ACTIVECOLOR : state.actSec === null ? NULLCOLOR : INACTIVECOLOR
		);
		webMI.gfx.setFill(
			passive.web1_connector,
			state.pasPrm ? ACTIVECOLOR : state.pasPrm === null ? NULLCOLOR : INACTIVECOLOR
		);
		webMI.gfx.setFill(
			passive.web2_connector,
			state.pasSec ? ACTIVECOLOR : state.pasSec === null ? NULLCOLOR : INACTIVECOLOR
		);
	});

	webMI.addEvent(["primary_vitality_clickarea", "secondary_vitality_clickarea"], "click", function () {
		webMI.display.openWindow({
			display: displayVitalityTable,
			extern: false,
			height: 520,
			menubar: false,
			modal: true,
			movable: true,
			resizable: false,
			scrollbars: false,
			status: false,
			title: "T{Vitality table}",
			toolbar: false,
			width: 1200
		});
	});

	/**
	 * TRIGGER SECTION
	 */
	webMI.trigger.connect(
		"clicked",
		function () {
			var value = true;
			return (function () {
				RedundancySetSplitmode();
			})(value);
		},
		"id_split_on"
	);

	webMI.trigger.connect(
		"clicked",
		function () {
			var value = true;
			return (function () {
				RedundancySetSplitmode();
			})(value);
		},
		"id_split_off"
	);

	webMI.trigger.connect("triggerSwitchPreferred", function (e) {
		e.value.close();
		RedundancySetPreferred();
	});

	webMI.trigger.connect(
		"clicked",
		function () {
			if (lockSwitchPreferred) {
				webMI.display.openWindow({
					display: displayMessageDialog,
					height: 400,
					width: 550,
					modal: true,
					resizable: false,
					movable: true,
					query: {
						headline: "T{Warning}: T{Server is not available.}",
						msg1: "T{The server you want to switch is not available to you. You won't have access} T{to the visualization anymore. Do you really want to perform a Switch-Over?}",
						btn1: "T{Yes, I know the risk}",
						btn2: "T{Cancel}",
						action_btn1: "triggerSwitchPreferred"
					}
				});
			} else {
				RedundancySetPreferred();
			}
		},
		"switch_preferred"
	);

	/**
	 * redundancy set preferred
	 * @constructor
	 */
	function RedundancySetPreferred() {
		var compareRights = [
			{ node: "SYSTEM.LIBRARY.ATVISE.WEBMIMETHODS.RedundancySetPreferred", right: "execute" },
			{ node: "SYSTEM.LIBRARY.ATVISE.SERVERSCRIPTS.Redundancy.SetPreferred", right: "execute" },
			{ node: "AGENT.REDUNDANCY.METHODS.setPreferred", right: "execute" }
		];

		if (accessControlManager) {
			accessControlManager.assist.handleWithPermissions(
				compareRights,
				function success() {
					proceedCall();
				},
				function failure() {
					return;
				}
			);
		} else {
			proceedCall();
		}

		function proceedCall() {
			webMI.data.call("RedundancySetPreferred", { preferred: "" }, function () {});
		}
	}

	/**
	 * redundancy set split mode
	 * @constructor
	 */
	function RedundancySetSplitmode() {
		var compareRights = [
			{ node: "SYSTEM.LIBRARY.ATVISE.WEBMIMETHODS.RedundancySetSplitmode", right: "execute" },
			{ node: "SYSTEM.LIBRARY.ATVISE.SERVERSCRIPTS.Redundancy.SetSplitmode", right: "execute" },
			{ node: "AGENT.REDUNDANCY.METHODS.setSplitmode", right: "execute" }
		];

		if (accessControlManager) {
			accessControlManager.assist.handleWithPermissions(
				compareRights,
				function success() {
					proceedCall();
				},
				function failure() {
					return;
				}
			);
		} else {
			proceedCall();
		}

		function proceedCall() {
			webMI.data.call("RedundancySetSplitmode", {}, function () {});
		}
	}

	/**
	 * check preferred button rights and set active if allowed
	 */
	function setPreferredButtonActive() {
		var compareButtonRights = [
			{ node: "SYSTEM.LIBRARY.ATVISE.WEBMIMETHODS.RedundancySetPreferred", right: "execute" },
			{ node: "SYSTEM.LIBRARY.ATVISE.SERVERSCRIPTS.Redundancy.SetPreferred", right: "execute" },
			{ node: "AGENT.REDUNDANCY.METHODS.setPreferred", right: "execute" },
			{ node: "AGENT.REDUNDANCY", right: "execute" }
		];

		accessControlManager.assist.handleWithPermissions(
			compareButtonRights,
			function success() {
				webMI.trigger.fire("com.atvise.setActive", true, "switch_preferred");
				webMI.trigger.fire("com.atvise.setActive", true, "current_preffered");
			},
			function failure() {
				webMI.trigger.fire("com.atvise.setActive", false, "switch_preferred");
				webMI.trigger.fire("com.atvise.setActive", false, "current_preffered");
			}
		);
	}

	/**
	 * check split buttons rights and set active if allowed
	 */
	function setSplitButtonActive() {
		var compareButtonRights = [
			{ node: "SYSTEM.LIBRARY.ATVISE.WEBMIMETHODS.RedundancySetSplitmode", right: "execute" },
			{ node: "SYSTEM.LIBRARY.ATVISE.SERVERSCRIPTS.Redundancy.SetSplitmode", right: "execute" },
			{ node: "AGENT.REDUNDANCY.METHODS.setSplitmode", right: "execute" },
			{ node: "AGENT.REDUNDANCY", right: "execute" }
		];

		accessControlManager.assist.handleWithPermissions(
			compareButtonRights,
			function success() {
				webMI.trigger.fire("com.atvise.setActive", true, "id_split_on");
				webMI.trigger.fire("com.atvise.setActive", true, "id_split_off");
				webMI.trigger.fire("com.atvise.setActive", true, "operating-mode");
			},
			function failure() {
				webMI.trigger.fire("com.atvise.setActive", false, "id_split_on");
				webMI.trigger.fire("com.atvise.setActive", false, "id_split_off");
				webMI.trigger.fire("com.atvise.setActive", false, "operating-mode");
			}
		);
	}
}
]]></code>
</script>
